decision_basis: all-valid-one-hot source-level equivalence to the immutable authority, supported by target-runtime raw-bit audits

row_mask_domain_proof.reason: Greater produces BOOL and Cast to FLOAT maps every element to exact float32 0 or 1. This is stronger than generator support and covers every finite valid one-hot input, every position/order, and both count boundaries.

generator_observation_2000.note: The heuristic mask is not confined to the latent box-height range 6..10 because random background cells contribute to row_rough_counts.

relevant_source_lines: Run(), 1691-1738: labels last seen in input zero are reduced from the first input before pairwise processing
PairwiseOperandProcess(), 1329-1337 and 1627-1632: remaining operands are reshaped and passed to MatMul with explicit lro/lo/reduced/ro sizes
ort_source_order_proof.conclusion: ORT does not sum 30 separately rounded products. It first sums row_mask, then performs one scalar product.

bitwise_proof.reduce: Every partial sum consists only of nonnegative integers 0..30. All are exactly representable in float32, so every reduction tree/order produces the exact integer n without rounding.
bitwise_proof.multiply: Both paths then compute one float32 product of exact n and the same normal float32 scalar. The Einsum MatMul has K=1, so there is no multi-term accumulation; adding an initial +0 cannot change the correctly rounded product, including n=0.
bitwise_proof.colq_scale: bitwise equal for all 2^30 binary row_mask tensors, hence for all valid one-hot and generator inputs
bitwise_proof.downstream: All nodes and initializers downstream of colq_scale are unchanged. Equal input and equal colq_scale bits therefore give equal final raw output under the same CPU runtime configuration.

independent_known_four_config_gate.semantic_identity: same initializers and same ReduceSum+Mul to Einsum rewrite; only topological placement and dummy equation labels differ

fresh_gate.reason: Parent stopped new large runs. The source-level proof covers the complete binary row_mask support, which is stronger than finite fresh sampling; the retained 2000-case exposed-intermediate run is corroboration, not the proof premise.
